1.description: Divine Bolt seeks out and destroys.

3.description: The Long Arm of Light: Greatly increases attack range and power for a short time & damages all Bloon Types.

5.description: Divine bolts pierce through more Bloons.

6.description: Shoots 3 Divine Bolts at a time.

7.description: Blood Sacrifice: Sacrifice a targeted Tower to grant Adora large amounts of XP and boost her attack range and rate of fire for a short time.

8.description: Shoots 4 Divine Bolts at a time.

9.description: Increased attack range and increased damage to Fortified Bloons.

10.description: Ball of Light: Brings forth a powerful ball of energy to strike down the Bloons.

12.description: Shoots 5 Divine Bolts at a time.

13.description: Divine Bolts pierce through even more Bloons. Increased damage to Fortified Bloons.

14.description: Shoots 6 Divine Bolts at a time.

15.description: Divine Bolts burn through an extra Bloon layer, plus Ball of Light deals more damage.

16.description: Long Arm of Light becomes even more deadly.

17.description: Adora increases attack speed even more.

18.description: Shoots 8 Divine Bolts at a time.

19.description: Increased attack range. Increased damage to Fortified Bloons.

20.description: Ball of Light is greatly improved, plus increased rate of fire, range, and duration buffs from Sacrifices.
